hero.lead: We design AI agents, knowledge systems, and automations that help teams find information, process documents, and handle repetitive tasks.
hero.trust_microcopy: Free demo on your own data · no obligation

panel.disclaimer: Times are illustrative — real results depend on your process

rotator.item_1: Extracts amounts, tax IDs, and due dates from invoices.
rotator.item_2: Answers questions based on your internal documents.
rotator.item_3: Runs repeatable tasks based on rules you set.

how_it_works.title: How we work together
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Together we identify tasks that take up time or repeat.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: We design an AI agent, automation, or knowledge system based on your data and processes.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: We test the solution on real documents and processes.
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Once approved, the system becomes part of daily operations.

products.title: Solutions & pricing
products.card_1_desc: AI assistants connected to your documents, data, and company systems.
products.card_1_examples: Internal assistant · Customer support · Sales assistant · Operations assistant
products.card_2_desc: AI chatbots and assistants that answer based on your company's internal documentation.
products.card_2_examples: Company knowledge base · Technical documentation · Internal processes · Customer support
products.card_3_desc: Automation of documents, emails, and repetitive tasks.
products.card_3_examples: Invoice processing · Email processing · Report generation · Data synchronization

why.title: Why ProjentIQ
why.item_1_desc: AI solutions are built on the documents, systems, and information your company already uses.
why.item_2_desc: Every company works differently. We build the design on your specific data and processes.
why.item_3_desc: Before you commit, you'll see the solution working on your own data.
why.item_4_desc: ERP, CRM, SharePoint, Google Drive, email, databases, or APIs.

trust_section.title: We sell technology only after we understand the problem.
trust_section.p1: We don't build generic AI solutions.
trust_section.p2: We first understand the process you want to improve. Only then do we design the technology.
trust_section.p3: The goal isn't to have more AI.
trust_section.p4: The goal is less manual work, faster access to information, and simpler processes.

testimonials.title: Our first deployments are underway
testimonials.coming_soon: No invented quotes — we'll fill this in once we have real deployments.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Processing happens within the EU and we don't share your documents with third parties. For sensitive setups, we can deploy directly on your own infrastructure.
faq.q2: Which accounting systems do you connect to?
faq.a2: Pohoda, Omega, iDoklad, and others via API or import. We can adapt to your own system too.
faq.a3: A first working demo on your own data usually takes up to two weeks. Full deployment depends on scope.
faq.q4: What if the system misreads a document?
faq.a4: Flagged fields are always highlighted for review, and nothing gets recorded without your approval. The system also learns from your corrections.

cta_band.title: We'll show you on your own data.
cta_band.lead: Send us the process or problem you want to solve. We'll design a concrete approach and demo the solution on real company data.

demos.title: See how it works in practice
demos.lead: Click and see what the solutions actually do — using sample data.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Tell us a bit about what you're looking to automate — we'll get back to you with a time for a short demo.
contact.message_placeholder: What would you like to automate?
contact.consent_pre: I agree to the processing of data for the purpose of responding to my request.
contact.success_message: We'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.error_consent: You need to agree to data processing before sending.
